scripts.dev: bun run dev:deps && trap 'kill 0' EXIT && mise exec -- air & bun run --cwd web/apps/api dev & bun run --cwd web/apps/ui dev & mise exec -- caddy run --config Caddyfile.dev & wait
scripts.dev:deps: docker compose up -d && printf 'Waiting for postgres' && until docker compose exec -T postgres pg_isready -U strata -q 2>/dev/null; do printf '.'; sleep 1; done && echo ' ready'
scripts.check: bun run go:lint && bun run go:vuln && bun run go:build && bun run go:test
scripts.check:web: bun install && bun run web:lint && bun run web:typecheck && bun run web:test
scripts.check:all: bun run check && bun run check:web
scripts.e2e:cluster: docker compose --profile cluster up --build -d && echo 'Waiting for cluster...' && until curl -sf http://localhost:8080/healthz > /dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done && STRATA_E2E_URL=http://localhost:8080 mise exec -- go test -race -count=1 -tags=e2e -timeout=15m -v ./e2e/...; s=$?; docker compose --profile cluster down -v; exit $s
